title: helichrysum kandavanense
intro: Helichrysum kandavanense is a rare and endemic flowering plant species native to Iran, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum kandavanense include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Helichrysum kandavanense is often used in the form of essential oils, infusions, or tinctures, which can be applied topically or consumed orally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
